topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules for scheduling and controlling Philips Hue lights based on time, including turning on, dimming, and changing colors for specific occasions or times of day.

rows.if_then_rule: IF every day at 11:00 PM THEN dim lamp 1 to 20% using Philips Hue.
IF specific time THEN dim light using Philips Hue.
IF every day at 9 PM THEN dim lights using Philips Hue.
IF new day THEN warn me to leave computer and go to bed using Philips Hue.
IF every day at specified time THEN set Skybell color using SkyBell HD.
IF every year on 14 July THEN change Hue lights to match the colours of the French flag.
IF every year on 6 December THEN change Hue lights to match the colours of the Finnish flag.
IF every day at specified time THEN adjust Hue lights to a softer white for sleep.
IF every year on 2 June THEN change Hue lights to match the colours of the Italian flag.
IF every year on 12 October THEN change Hue lights to match the colours of the Spanish flag.
IF every year on Christmas Eve THEN set Hue lights to Christmas colors.
IF every year on Christmas at 10 AM THEN change Hue bulbs to red and green.
IF every hour THEN randomize Hue lights color.
IF every day at specified time THEN dim Hue lights to 66% brightness.
IF every weekday at 06:45 AM THEN set a scene using Philips Hue.
IF every weeknight at 11:00 PM THEN set a scene using Philips Hue.
IF every day at specified time THEN change front porch lights to purple using Philips Hue.
IF every year on Halloween THEN set color to orange using Philips Hue.
IF every year on St. Patrick's Day THEN change Hue lights to green.
